text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Saturn is exactly eighty light-minutes away from
this very spot... Assuming a ten-centimeter
diameter, that's the equivalent of lining up 140
million donuts.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Easy-peasy! If I go all out, I can make that
distance in two days!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
YOU! Get ready for lift off! Prepare the
emergency donuts!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
After all, when the going gets tough, the tough
need donuts...
